---
title = "Methods"
---

This chapter covers the methods and tools used throughout the book.

## Setup

Describe the setup and prerequisites.

```r
# Example R code
summary(mtcars)
```

## Analysis

Describe the analysis approach.

```python
# Example Python code
import numpy as np
x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)
print(f"Generated {len(x)} points")
```
